sys_atf_suite.name: ITSMMT-214 Proactive Incident Creator Suite
sys_atf_suite.description: ATF tests for ProactiveIncidentCreator — covers auto-creation, dedup guard, and priority derivation.

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-214-T001: P2 Incident Created on Degraded State
sys_atf_test.description: Asserts that a P2 incident is auto-created when u_anomaly_event.u_state = 3 (Degraded).

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-214-T002: Duplicate Incident Guard
sys_atf_test.description: Asserts that a second incident is NOT created when an open P1/P2 already exists for the CI.

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-214-T003: P1 Incident on Outage State
sys_atf_test.description: Asserts that P1 priority is set when anomaly state is Outage (4).
